themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּירָ֤א: was afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 12 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: וַיִּירָ֤א: was afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten
